title: This Tech ETF Has More than Doubled in 2026. Is It a Good Buy for the Back Half of the Year?
author: Stefon Walters
description: The iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX) has surged 108% year-to-date, significantly outperforming the S&P 500's 9% gain. While the ETF provides diversified exposure to the semiconductor supply chain through 30 major companies, the article cautions that current growth rates are unsustainable long-term. The main drawback is its 0.34% expense ratio, which is 10 times higher than typical S&P 500 ETFs. The article recommends SOXX as a buy for those seeking semiconductor industry exposure during the AI boom, but warns against expecting similar returns in the future.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The ETF is praised for its 108% year-to-date returns, strong 3-year and 5-year performance, and comprehensive exposure to the semiconductor supply chain. It's recommended as a good buy for those seeking semiconductor industry exposure during the AI boom.
Listed as a top holding and pure-play chip designer in SOXX with significant growth potential in the AI ecosystem.

title: Sputtering Equipment Market Size to Hit USD 4.19 Billion by 2035 | Research by SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global sputtering equipment market, valued at USD 2.41 billion in 2025, is projected to reach USD 4.19 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 5.83%. Growth is driven by rising semiconductor fabrication demand, thin-film deposition applications, and expanding solar photovoltaic manufacturing. Magnetron sputtering equipment leads the market with 42.25% share, while Asia-Pacific dominates regionally with 45.35% market share.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company expanded its advanced PVD portfolio with next-generation deposition platforms for sub-5nm semiconductor nodes in September 2025, demonstrating innovation and market leadership in sputtering equipment technology.

Company introduced upgraded plasma deposition platforms with enhanced uniformity control in August 2025, supporting advanced-node semiconductor fabrication and positioning itself well in the growing market.
Listed as a leading market player but no specific recent developments or performance metrics provided in the article.

title: Small Caps Near Record Highs, Robinhood Rallies 12%: Stock Market Today
author: Piero Cingari
description: U.S. stocks traded higher midday Wednesday with semiconductor equipment names and small caps leading gains ahead of Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's first interest-rate decision. The Russell 2000 jumped 1.2% to a record high. Applied Materials surged 7% after Citi raised its price target, while Robinhood rallied 12.2% on strong trading volumes. Exchange operators fell sharply after Kalshi's Bitcoin futures approval raised competitive concerns.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Surged 7% after Citi raised price target to $710 from $550 and reiterated Buy rating, citing durable AI-driven demand for wafer-fab equipment
Jumped 12.2% after Deutsche Bank raised price target to $105 from $98, citing record June trading volumes and workforce optimization
Surged 13.3% on reports that OpenAI is evaluating capacity at the company's Project Matador AI power campus with potential for major commercial agreement
Dropped 5.8% after analysts flagged Kalshi's approval to offer Bitcoin perpetual futures as a competitive threat to incumbent venues
Fell 4.4% due to competitive concerns from Kalshi's Bitcoin futures approval affecting exchange operators
Dropped 7.6% as peer exchange operators were hammered by competitive threats from Kalshi's Bitcoin futures approval
Fell 7.0% despite beating earnings expectations, as profit slipped year-over-year from $1.38 to $1.31 adjusted EPS

title: Applied Materials Advances AI Wearables With SENZ Platform
author: Lekha Gupta
description: Applied Materials launched SENZ, an integrated ambient visual platform for AI-powered smart glasses that combines waveguide optics and light engine technology. The company also signed a long-term joint development agreement with EssilorLuxottica to advance next-generation intelligent optical systems for AR and AI-powered smart eyewear. AMAT shares rose 7.58% to $611.30 on the announcement.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company launched innovative SENZ platform addressing fragmented smart glasses market, secured strategic partnership with major eyewear company EssilorLuxottica, and stock surged 7.58% on announcement. Technical indicators show strong momentum with stock trading 26% above 20-day SMA, though RSI at 70.72 suggests overbought conditions.

Secured long-term joint development agreement with Applied Materials to advance next-generation intelligent optical systems for AR and AI-powered smart eyewear, combining their eyewear expertise with AMAT's materials engineering and waveguide technology.
Broader technology sector performing well with XLK gaining approximately 1.38% on the day of the announcement, benefiting from positive sentiment in the AI and semiconductor equipment space.

title: Applied Materials Unveils SENZ™, a Fully Integrated Visual System for Next-Gen Smart Glasses
author: Na
description: Applied Materials unveiled SENZ™, an integrated ambient visual platform combining waveguide optics, light engine, sensing, and vision correction technology for next-generation smart glasses. The solution aims to reduce time-to-market and manufacturing complexity through strategic partnerships with GlobalFoundries, Qualcomm Technologies, and EssilorLuxottica.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company announced a groundbreaking integrated technology platform addressing market constraints, establishing strategic partnerships with major industry players, and positioning itself as a leader in next-generation smart glasses display solutions.

Selected as strategic manufacturing partner to produce waveguides at scale using their high-volume fabrication facility in Singapore, indicating confidence in their capabilities and potential revenue opportunity.
Collaborating through Snapdragon START program to support AI-powered next-generation smart glasses, positioning the company in the emerging augmented reality ecosystem.
Entered joint development program to accelerate commercialization of next-generation intelligent optical systems for AR and smart eyewear, leveraging their optical expertise in the growing market.
